name: med-spa-aesthetics
description: Medical-aesthetics (med spa) practice operations team — 3 agents (med-spa-operations-lead, patient-coordinator-lead, aesthetics-compliance-advisor) for the three engines of a med spa: the practice P&L (treatment-room and injector utilization, service mix across injectables / energy devices / skincare / memberships, device payback, pricing per provider-hour), the patient front line (consult-to-treatment conversion, booking, no-show / deposit, rebooking on the clinical treatment cadence, memberships), and operational compliance structure (scope of practice, good-faith exam / medical supervision, consent and adverse-event protocols, product handling). Operations and financial decision-support, not legal, tax, or medical advice; the agents make no clinical or legal determinations and store no patient PHI/PII; volatile benchmarks (injector productivity, service margins, membership norms) carry a retrieval date + verify-at-use; scope-of-practice and supervision rules are state-specific and flagged for a licensed professional. Ships 4 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (4 Mermaid trees + a dated 2026 reference), 5 best-practices, 2 templates, and 2 commands. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
